params.name: Higgs Boson
params.description:
On Jan 19, 2012 AD, the Fermilab announced that the Higgs boson is real.
According to the latest experiments, the Higgs boson, also known as the God Particle, exists. With mass, particles can be combined into atoms, with atoms, molecules, and objects. Therefore, the Higgs boson is considered a particle that shapes everything in the world. Without it, there would be no world. Therefore, the physicist, Higgs, proposed the Higgs mechanism, according to which, symmetry is broken spontaneously in …
